name: Shibuya Hachiko smoking area
en: Designated smoking spot by Hachiko square — street smoking is fined in Shibuya.
de: Ausgewiesene Raucherzone am Hachiko-Platz — Rauchen auf der Straße ist in Shibuya bußgeldpflichtig.

name: Shinjuku West smoking area
en: Designated area near the west exit of Shinjuku Station.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone nahe dem Westausgang der Shinjuku-Station.

name: Kabukicho smoking area
en: Smoking spot east of Shinjuku Station, near Kabukicho.
de: Raucherzone östlich der Shinjuku-Station, nahe Kabukicho.

name: Ikebukuro East smoking area
en: Designated area by the east exit of Ikebukuro Station.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone am Ostausgang der Ikebukuro-Station.

name: Ueno Hirokoji smoking area
en: Smoking spot near Ueno Station / Ameyoko.
de: Raucherzone nahe Ueno-Station / Ameyoko.

name: Akihabara UDX smoking area
en: Designated area by the UDX building in Akihabara.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone am UDX-Gebäude in Akihabara.

name: Ginza Sukiyabashi smoking area
en: Smoking spot near Sukiyabashi crossing, Ginza.
de: Raucherzone nahe der Sukiyabashi-Kreuzung, Ginza.

name: Tokyo Station Yaesu smoking area
en: Designated area on the Yaesu side of Tokyo Station.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone auf der Yaesu-Seite des Bahnhofs Tokio.

name: Asakusa Kaminarimon smoking area
en: Smoking spot near Kaminarimon / Senso-ji approach.
de: Raucherzone nahe Kaminarimon / Senso-ji-Zugang.

name: Osaka Umeda smoking area
en: Designated area around Osaka/Umeda Station.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone rund um die Osaka/Umeda-Station.

name: Namba smoking area
en: Smoking spot near Namba Station / Dotonbori.
de: Raucherzone nahe Namba-Station / Dotonbori.

name: Shinsaibashi smoking area
en: Designated area along Shinsaibashi.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone entlang Shinsaibashi.

name: Tennoji smoking area
en: Smoking spot near Tennoji Station.
de: Raucherzone nahe Tennoji-Station.

name: Kyoto Station smoking area
en: Designated area at Kyoto Station.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone am Bahnhof Kyoto.

name: Kawaramachi smoking area
en: Smoking spot near Kawaramachi / Gion.
de: Raucherzone nahe Kawaramachi / Gion.

name: Susukino smoking area
en: Designated area in Susukino, Sapporo.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone in Susukino, Sapporo.

name: Tenjin smoking area
en: Smoking spot in Tenjin, Fukuoka.
de: Raucherzone in Tenjin, Fukuoka.

name: Sakae smoking area
en: Designated area in Sakae, Nagoya.
de: Ausgewiesene Zone in Sakae, Nagoya.

name: 7-Bank ATM (7-Eleven)
en: In every 7-Eleven — takes foreign Visa/Mastercard/Maestro, 24h, English menu.
de: In jedem 7-Eleven — akzeptiert ausländische Visa/Mastercard/Maestro, 24h, engl. Menü.

name: Japan Post Bank ATM
en: At post offices — also accepts most foreign cards; wide coverage.
de: In Postämtern — akzeptiert ebenfalls die meisten ausländischen Karten; große Abdeckung.

name: AEON Bank ATM
en: In AEON malls & Ministop — foreign-card friendly, often fee-free.
de: In AEON-Malls & Ministop — kartenfreundlich, oft gebührenfrei.

name: Coin lockers — Tokyo Station
en: Large coin-locker banks; pay by IC card. Fill up fast at peak times.
de: Große Schließfachanlagen; Zahlung per IC-Karte. Zu Stoßzeiten schnell voll.

name: Coin lockers — Shinjuku Station
en: Lockers throughout Shinjuku Station; IC-card payment.
de: Schließfächer in der ganzen Shinjuku-Station; IC-Karten-Zahlung.

name: Coin lockers — Kyoto Station
en: Big locker area near the central gate.
de: Großer Schließfachbereich nahe dem Zentraltor.

name: Yamato luggage forwarding — Narita
en: Takkyubin counter: send bags airport → hotel (usually next day).
de: Takkyubin-Schalter: Gepäck Flughafen → Hotel senden (meist am nächsten Tag).

name: Yamato luggage forwarding — Kansai Airport
en: Forward bags KIX → hotel so you travel light.
de: Gepäck KIX → Hotel senden, um leicht zu reisen.

name: Don Quijote Shibuya (24h)
en: 24-hour discount + drugstore, tax-free, everything under one roof.
de: 24h Discount + Drogerie, Tax-Free, alles unter einem Dach.

name: Matsumoto Kiyoshi
en: Drugstore chain — meds, cosmetics, tax-free; branches everywhere.
de: Drogerie-Kette — Medikamente, Kosmetik, Tax-Free; überall Filialen.

name: 7-Eleven
en: 7-Bank ATM (foreign cards), pay bills/tickets, onigiri & oden, free Wi-Fi.
de: 7-Bank-ATM (ausländische Karten), Rechnungen/Tickets, Onigiri & Oden, Gratis-WLAN.

name: FamilyMart
en: Famichiki fried chicken, Famima ATM, ticket machine, hot snacks.
de: Famichiki-Hähnchen, Famima-ATM, Ticketautomat, warme Snacks.

name: Lawson
en: Karaage-kun, Loppi ticket kiosk, Uchi Café sweets, Natural Lawson.
de: Karaage-kun, Loppi-Ticketkiosk, Uchi-Café-Süßes, Natural Lawson.

name: Free Wi-Fi
en: Konbini, stations and many cafés offer free Wi-Fi; the 'Japan Wi-Fi auto-connect' app links many spots.
de: Konbini, Bahnhöfe und viele Cafés bieten Gratis-WLAN; die App 'Japan Wi-Fi auto-connect' verbindet viele Spots.
